meta.siteTitle: Acecore | System Development, Web Design & IT Education
meta.defaultDescription: Acecore is a technology collective that provides system development, website design, server operations, design, and IT education as a one-stop solution.

home.heroTitle: From development to design and education. One-stop IT support.
home.heroSubtitle: System development, web design, server operations, design, and IT education — all from a single point of contact.
home.heroImgTeam: Team working in a co-working space
home.servicesLead: Not sure where to start? We flexibly serve both individuals and businesses.

serviceCards.title: Business System & App Development
serviceCards.description: We solve challenges like streamlining operations and improving data management with optimal systems. From small tools to large-scale services.

serviceCards.title: Server Setup & Operations
serviceCards.description: We deliver reliable, fast server environments. Proven track record supporting hundreds of simultaneous connections.

serviceCards.title: Website Design & Management
serviceCards.description: Websites designed not just for looks, but for user experience and lead generation. Post-launch maintenance included.

serviceCards.title: Design & Creative
serviceCards.description: Logos, business cards, banners, characters — we give visible form to your message.

serviceCards.title: IT School / Acecore Schools
serviceCards.description: Personalized tutoring for all ages — programming, academic support, and high school equivalency exam preparation.

serviceCards.title: Aceserver
serviceCards.description: A free public Minecraft server for everyone. Supports Java and Bedrock editions with an active community.

home.layersDescription: We treat technology, operations, expression, and education as a single support line.

layerItems.title: System Design
layerItems.description: We turn business challenges into requirements, building systems with implementation and operation in mind.

layerItems.title: Infrastructure Operations
layerItems.description: Based on public server operation experience, we build resilient environments and improvement cycles.

layerItems.title: Communication Design
layerItems.description: We approach design as information organization and experience design, not decoration.

layerItems.title: Education & Mentoring
layerItems.description: We transform practical knowledge into learning support, cycling it to communities and the next generation.

home.aboutBody1: We regularly host study groups and workshops, fostering a learning community with our clients and partners.
home.aboutBody2: Through open-source contribution, regional collaboration, and {link} initiatives, we build partnerships connecting technology and people.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Acecore's mission, philosophy, and activities. We drive development, education, and community engagement through the synergy of technology and creativity.
about.heroSubtitle: What Acecore strives for and values
about.missionLoopDesc: A visual breakdown of how Acecore creates and expands value.
about.philosophyBody1: Acecore is a technology collective that creates diverse value through the power of technology and creativity. We provide system development, website design, server operations, design, and IT education as a one-stop solution, serving a wide range of clients from individuals to businesses.
about.philosophyBody2: Our mission is to connect people through technology and expand possibilities through creativity. We value not just providing technology, but growing together with our clients and community to create sustainable value.
about.communityDesc: Under the themes of connection, discovery, and co-creation, we regularly hold tech study groups and workshops. We provide a space where participants inspire each other and new ideas are born. Activity reports are also shared on our blog.
about.ossDesc: We actively promote the use and contribution to open-source software and the tech community. Some of our internally developed tools and libraries are published on GitHub.
about.regionalDesc: We collaborate with regional educational institutions and businesses to promote IT adoption and develop digital talent. Our teaching at Acecore Schools is part of this effort.
about.partnershipDesc: We welcome project collaborations and business partnerships. We can cooperate across a wide range of fields including technology, design, and education.
about.ctaHeading: Take the next step with Acecore
about.ctaBody: We're always open to service inquiries and partnership proposals.

valueCycle.title: Implement Technology
valueCycle.description: We build operational foundations through system development and server operations.

valueCycle.title: Transform into Expression
valueCycle.description: We deliver compelling experiences through web design and creative work.

valueCycle.title: Nurture People and Spaces
valueCycle.description: We foster new participants and learning through community and educational activities.

valueCycle.title: Feed Back into New Challenges
valueCycle.description: We channel insights back into development and support, strengthening all activities.

activities: Collaborative teaching with regional educational institutions

services.title: Services
services.description: Explore Acecore's comprehensive services including system development, website design, server operations, design, and IT education.
services.heroSubtitle: Diverse IT solutions delivered as a one-stop service
services.serviceMapDesc: Development, operations, communication, and education are designed as a continuous support line.
services.mapDevDesc: We design and implement business systems and apps to fit your operational workflow.
services.mapInfraDesc: We provide stable cloud and server operations, including monitoring and maintenance.
services.mapPublishDesc: We organize and deliver your message through website and design production.
services.mapEducationDesc: We connect education and mentoring so your team can independently operate the technology we introduce.

systemDev.title: Business System & App Development
systemDev.desc: We develop systems and applications tailored to your challenges — from operational efficiency and automation to data management. We handle everything from small internal tools to large-scale web services. Feel free to consult us even if you're not sure where to start.
examples: Business management system, CRM, and ERP design & development
Web application, SPA, and mobile app development
API design, third-party service integration, and data infrastructure

server.title: Server Setup & Operations
server.desc: We specialize in building and operating secure, stable server environments. Acecore has long-term experience running Aceserver (a public Minecraft server), and we bring that expertise to enterprise clients. We're also happy to discuss server migration and cloud adoption.
examples: Cloud server (AWS / Azure / GCP / Cloudflare) design & setup
Linux / Windows server operations, monitoring & maintenance
Game server and community server setup

web.title: Website Design & Management
web.desc: We handle everything from planning to production and maintenance for corporate sites, portfolios, e-commerce, and community sites. We deliver high-quality sites with the latest technology and SEO best practices.
examples: Corporate website and landing page design
CMS setup, blog, and media sites
SEO optimization, performance tuning, and accessibility improvements
web.featureLinksBody: Check the web production and operations features from the pricing guide together with their implementation articles.

design.title: Design & Creative
design.desc: We handle a wide range of creative production including logo design, print materials, banners, and character design. We value accurately shaping what you want to communicate. Combined with our web design services, we can handle everything from design to publication.
examples: Business cards, brochures, posters, and other print materials
Web banners and social media creatives

education.title: IT School / Acecore Schools
education.desc: A school where working engineers directly teach practical IT skills. We offer a wide range of educational programs including tutoring, robot programming, practical programming, PC/smartphone classes, and high school equivalency exam preparation — all personalized to each student.
courses: High School Equivalency (exam prep & study plans)

aceserver.title: Aceserver (Public Minecraft Server)
aceserver.desc: Aceserver is a free public Minecraft server operated by Acecore. With the philosophy of being 'a place for everyone,' players can join from both Java and Bedrock editions and enjoy multiplayer in a vanilla-like environment. With a proven track record supporting hundreds of simultaneous connections, the infrastructure expertise gained here is also applied to our enterprise services.
features: Free to join for everyone (just need an account)
Active Discord community for interaction and information sharing
Streaming and promotion welcome (no application required)

acestudio.title: AceStudio
acestudio.desc: AceStudio is a new service currently being developed by Acecore. As a platform to maximize creative potential, it will support creative activities across design, video, music, development, and more.
acestudio.note: Service details will be published once preparations are complete. Follow us on X or our blog for the latest updates.
areas: Multi-domain support: design, video, music, programming
Seamless workflow from creation to publication

services.ctaBody: It's OK even if you're not sure what to ask for. Estimates are free.

pricing.title: Pricing Guide
pricing.body: These rough ranges help you judge fit early. All prices are tax-included estimates and may vary after scope definition; external costs are separate.
pricing.ctaHeading: Ask us for a detailed cost estimate.
pricing.ctaBody: We will ask about your goal and rough budget, then organize scope and priorities before estimating.

items.label: Business System & App Development
items.note: Small automation from ¥300,000, business tools from ¥500,000, mid-sized systems from ¥1,500,000, integrated systems from ¥2,500,000.

items.label: AI Contact Chat
items.note: Add an AI contact chat to a static site, including site context, rate limits, Origin checks, and safe link rendering.

items.label: Blog Comments Feature
items.note: Add comment posting and spam protection with Cloudflare Pages Functions, D1, and Turnstile without relying on external services.

items.label: CMS Editing Screen
items.note: Add a Sveltia CMS admin screen so blog posts, fixed pages, notices, and settings can be updated from the browser.

items.label: Blog / Article Base
items.note: Prepare article lists, detail pages, tags or categories, related posts, RSS, and search paths for ongoing publishing.

items.label: Multilingual Blog Workflow
items.note: Set up source-language editing, translation PRs, hreflang, sitemap, and RSS for multilingual blog operations.

items.label: SEO / Structured Data
items.note: Organize OGP, JSON-LD, sitemaps, RSS, canonical URLs, and metadata that search engines need.

items.label: Pagefind Site Search
items.note: Add Pagefind search to a static site, including the search UI, URL parameters, and cache settings.

items.label: Performance Tuning
items.note: Review images, CSS, fonts, lazy loading, and measurement results to improve Core Web Vitals.

items.label: Accessibility Improvements
items.note: Check contrast, ARIA attributes, focus states, and form validation, aiming for WCAG AA improvements.

items.label: Security Headers / CSP
items.note: Clean up Cloudflare Pages _headers, CSP, and admin-screen delivery settings for safer publishing.

items.label: CTA / Form Handoff
items.note: Carry service type, subject, and page context from service CTAs into the contact form to improve lead flow.

items.label: Server Setup & Operations
items.note: Monitoring and maintenance are typically ¥10,000-¥100,000/month. Cloud usage fees are separate.

items.label: Website Production & Operations
items.note: Landing pages and small sites from ¥150,000, corporate sites ¥500,000-¥1,500,000, maintenance ¥10,000-¥50,000/month.

items.label: Design & Creative
items.note: Logos ¥50,000-¥150,000, flyers and banners ¥20,000-¥120,000, brand/web-connected design from ¥100,000.

items.label: Acecore Schools
items.note: Admission, materials, and management fee ranges are also listed on the Schools page.

items.label: Aceserver
items.note: Public server participation is free. Corporate setup and operations are estimated individually.

items.label: AceStudio / Video Production
items.note: A rough range for short videos and editing. Planning and filming are estimated individually.

timeline.title: Hearing
timeline.description: Organize goals and constraints, clarify priorities.

timeline.title: Design & Proposal
timeline.description: Define required technology, screens, and operational rules.

timeline.title: Production & Development
timeline.description: Implement across development, design, and infrastructure.

timeline.title: Launch & Maintenance
timeline.description: Ongoing support including improvement proposals and additional development.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Acecore here. Feel free to reach out with questions about our services, estimates, partnership inquiries, and more.
contact.heroSubtitle: Questions, consultations, and requests — start here
contact.formSuccess: Your inquiry has been sent. Please check your confirmation email.
contact.formError: Failed to send. Please try again later or check the contact options below.
contact.formSubmitNote: You will receive a confirmation email after submission. If you don't receive it, please check your spam folder.
contact.formFaqHeading: You can check common questions and related information before sending.
contact.methodLineDesc: Feel free to contact us via LINE
contact.methodXDesc: We also accept inquiries via DM
contact.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address
contact.aiLead: Use the AI chat in the lower right for services, development or website questions, schools, and reply timing. For detailed consultation, you can continue with the form.
contact.aiPlaceholder: Example: I want to discuss a website project. Where should I start?
contact.aiError: AI answers are unavailable. Please use the contact form.
contact.lineLead: Follow the official LINE account for updates. It is also useful for short questions and school-related messages.
contact.directMethodsNote: For short questions, use LINE. For simple checks on social media, X is also available. Detailed requests are easier to review through the form.
contact.directContactSummary: If you want to contact us directly
contact.directContactLead: Open this if you need to add details after submitting the form or confirm something directly.

faqs.question: I am not sure which service to ask about.
faqs.answer: You can ask about system development, web production, server operations, design, and IT education together. If unsure, choose Other and describe your situation.

faqs.question: Can I ask only for an estimate?
faqs.answer: Yes. Estimates are free. Please include the goal, timing, current issue, and rough budget if available.

faqs.question: Can I ask about Acecore Schools here?
faqs.answer: Yes. Please include what you want to learn, age or grade, and preferred learning pace.

faqs.question: How long does a reply take?
faqs.answer: We usually reply within 1-2 business days. For follow-up details after sending, LINE or the contact options below are also available.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Acecore's Privacy Policy. Information about personal data handling, advertising, analytics, and disclaimers.
privacy.adBody1: This site (Acecore) uses Google AdSense, a third-party advertising service.
privacy.adBody2: Advertising providers may use cookies to display ads based on user interests.
privacy.adBody3: For details on disabling cookies and about Google AdSense, please see the Google Policies and Terms.
privacy.analyticsBody1: This site may use Google Analytics as an access analytics tool.
privacy.analyticsBody2: Google Analytics uses cookies for traffic data collection, but this data is collected anonymously and does not identify individuals.
privacy.analyticsBody3: You can opt out of this data collection by disabling cookies. Please check your browser settings.
privacy.personalInfoBody: When using our contact form, we may ask for personal information such as your name and email address. Personal information collected will only be used to respond to inquiries and for necessary communications, and will not be used for any other purpose.
privacy.disclosureHeading: Disclosure of Personal Information to Third Parties
privacy.disclosureBody: Personal information collected will not be disclosed to third parties except in the following cases:
privacy.disclosureItem1: When the individual has given consent
privacy.disclosureItem2: When disclosure is required by law
privacy.disclaimerBody: While we strive to provide accurate information on this site, information may become outdated or contain errors. We accept no liability for any damages arising from the information on this site.
privacy.copyrightBody: The copyright of text, images, and other content published on this site belongs to Acecore or their respective rights holders. Unauthorized reproduction or copying is prohibited.
privacy.contactBody: For inquiries regarding this policy, please contact us through the contact page.

acestudio.title: AceStudio
acestudio.description: AceStudio is a creative platform currently in development by Acecore. Details coming soon.
acestudio.studioScopeDesc: A summary of our content, community, and monetization approach for the public site.
acestudio.comingSoonHeading: A new creative experience, coming soon.
acestudio.comingSoonBody1: AceStudio is a new service currently being developed by Acecore.
acestudio.comingSoonBody2: As a platform to maximize creative potential, it will support creative activities across design, video, music, development, and more.
acestudio.comingSoonBody3: Service details will be published on this page once preparations are complete.
acestudio.pullQuoteText: Don't just create. Deliver, nurture, and keep it moving.
acestudio.newsBody: Release information and the latest development updates will be shared on Acecore's X account and blog.
acestudio.inquiryText: For inquiries and requests about AceStudio

studioAreas.title: Content Production
studioAreas.description: We bring projects to life across video, streaming, design, and development.

studioAreas.title: Creator Support
studioAreas.description: We're building systems to support individual creators' publishing and production activities.

studioAreas.title: Community Management
studioAreas.description: We prioritize building spaces where fans and participants can maintain ongoing connections.

studioAreas.title: Revenue Model Validation
studioAreas.description: We're translating revenue models under consideration into actual operations.

faqs.question: When will AceStudio be released?
faqs.answer: Currently in preparation. We'll announce the release date on X and our blog once it's decided.

faqs.question: Will there be any fees?
faqs.answer: The pricing structure is currently under consideration. We plan to offer a free tier.

faqs.question: What kinds of creative activities are covered?
faqs.answer: We broadly support digital creative activities including design, video, music, and programming.

faqs.question: Can I pre-register or make a reservation?
faqs.answer: Pre-registration is not currently available, but following us on X will keep you informed of the latest news.

pricing.title: Pricing Guide
pricing.description: A pricing guide for Acecore system development, website production, server operations, design, Acecore Schools, and related services.
pricing.heroSubtitle: Compare rough costs across services before you contact us.
pricing.introTitle: Start with a realistic cost range
pricing.introBody: All amounts are rough tax-included estimates. Final estimates vary by requirements, scale, prepared materials, and external service costs.
pricing.serviceBody: We support small first steps as well as combined production, development, and operations work.
pricing.schoolsFeeBody: We list admission, tuition, and materials/management fee ranges so families can consider the total cost before contacting us.
pricing.ctaHeading: If the range looks reasonable, start with a free consultation.
pricing.ctaBody: Share your goal, timing, and rough budget as far as you know. We will organize the necessary scope and suggest a realistic path.

items.title: Business System & App Development
items.body: Small automation starts from ¥300,000, business tools from ¥500,000, mid-sized systems from ¥1,500,000, and integrated systems from ¥2,500,000.

items.title: AI Contact Chat
items.body: Add an AI contact chat to a static site, including site context, rate limits, Origin checks, and safe link rendering.

items.title: Blog Comments Feature
items.body: Build comment posting, D1 storage, Turnstile bot protection, origin controls, and moderation workflow without external comment services.

items.title: CMS Editing Screen
items.body: Add a Sveltia CMS admin screen so blog posts, fixed pages, notices, and settings can be updated from the browser.

items.title: Blog / Article Base
items.body: Prepare article lists, detail pages, tags or categories, related posts, RSS, and search paths for ongoing publishing.

items.title: Multilingual Blog Workflow
items.body: Set up source-language editing, translation PRs, hreflang, sitemap, and RSS for multilingual blog operations.

items.title: SEO / Structured Data
items.body: Organize OGP, JSON-LD, sitemaps, RSS, canonical URLs, and metadata that search engines need.

items.title: Pagefind Site Search
items.body: Add Pagefind search to a static site, including the search UI, URL parameters, and cache settings.

items.title: Performance Tuning
items.body: Review images, CSS, fonts, lazy loading, and measurement results to improve Core Web Vitals.

items.title: Accessibility Improvements
items.body: Check contrast, ARIA attributes, focus states, and form validation, aiming for WCAG AA improvements.

items.title: Security Headers / CSP
items.body: Clean up Cloudflare Pages _headers, CSP, and admin-screen delivery settings for safer publishing.

items.title: CTA / Form Handoff

items.title: Server Setup & Operations
items.body: Cloud and VPS setup, monitoring, and backup design. Monitoring and maintenance are typically ¥10,000-¥100,000/month.

items.title: Website Production & Operations
items.body: Landing pages and small sites start from ¥150,000. Corporate sites are typically ¥500,000-¥1,500,000, with maintenance from ¥10,000-¥50,000/month.

items.body: Short videos and editing are typically ¥30,000-¥300,000/video. Planning and filming are estimated individually.

items.title: Aceserver
items.body: The public server is free to join. Corporate game server setup and operations are estimated individually.

schoolFees.note: One-time fee. Varies by grade and course.
Varies by weekly frequency, lesson time, and individual instruction content.
Materials, robot parts, PC/license fees, and similar costs may be charged separately depending on the course.

factors: Clarity of requirements, number of screens, number of features, and external integrations.
Design depth and whether copy, photos, and video materials are already prepared.
Scope of post-launch maintenance, monitoring, updates, and improvement proposals.
External costs such as materials, equipment, printing, ads, and cloud usage fees.
notes: All prices are rough tax-included estimates. Final prices are quoted individually after consultation.
External costs such as domains, servers, ads, printing, materials, equipment, and travel are separate.
If you already have a budget, we will organize priorities and propose a realistic scope within it.
